evidence_snippet: Jena married the Prince of Dragonstone, Baelor Targaryen. Together they had two sons: Valarr and Matarys.

reason: Marcher lords is a collective concept — their distrust of Daeron II and his heir is context; no direct edge from Jena Dondarrion to the marcher lords concept
Prince of Dragonstone is a title for Baelor Targaryen — already captured via MARRIED_TO baelor-targaryen edge; no separate edge to the title concept
